name: Candy Yuzu And Kinkan
description:
A sweet, citrus-flavored snack made with yuzu and kumquat.
*Made in a facility that processes eggs, milk, peanuts, shellfish and wheat.

name: Nylon Makeup Box - Large
description:
Perfect storage and organizer for your make up tools and skin care items. You can also use them in combination with our Polypropylene Makeup Boxes for additional organization.
Includes a detachable brush holder and a handle so you can travel with convenience.

name: Styrene Divider - Small
description: This styrene 3-partition rack has a sturdy, stable construction that makes organizing and retrieving books, magazines, and documents easy and stress-free. Great for use on a bookshelf or desk, it can be used horizontally or vertically to fit your needs.

name: Stainless Steel Wired Rack
description:
A wire rack for bathroom storage that drains well and does not rust easily. Neatly stores bottles or small items within a stainless steel frame design featuring thoughtful spacing so that residue can easily be rinsed off.
*Other products pictured are not included.

name: Japanese Style Carrot Umami Dressing
description:
Rich carrot flavor and sweetness meets gentle tang and savory depth.
Made with real carrots, smooth apple cider vinegar, sweet Mirin, and savory soy sauce, this Japanese-style dressing brings a balanced and flavorful twist to your meals.

name: Panama Fedora Hat
description: This Panama fedora hat is perfect for sunny days, with a wide brim that gives you extra sun protection. Individually made by hand-knitting durable toquilla straw, giving it a natural texture that is breathable in hot weather and provides air circulation for your head. A hidden strap on the inside allows for size adjustment.

name: Waffle Weave Blanket - Single
description: Made with a soft and fluffy waffle texture, this cotton blanket features a moderate thickness and a smooth feel. Recommended as summer bedding or for relaxing in the living room. When not in use, draping it over the back of a sofa adds a stylish accent to your room's decor.

name: Women's Kapok Blend Denim Jumper Dress
description:
The perfect versatile dress for layering over a t-shirt or blouse. It has a casual design that suits a variety of styles depending on what it is paired with. The side opens with a zipper so it is quick and easy to put on, and there is a slit on the back for comfortable movement. 
Made with a blend of organic cotton and kapok, an environmentally friendly plant grown without pesticides. By using a fabric that mixes kapok with cotton, it is softer and lighter than conventional 100% cotton.

name: Polypropylene Storage Box Wide - Deep (W19.9 x D14.6 x H12.4")
description:
A storage box made of polypropylene, designed to perfectly fit file boxes and other storage items without gaps in between. It's perfect for organizing items, whether you use it in the kitchen, bathroom, or office. The translucent material allows you to quickly see its contents for convenience. Use with inner trays or smaller storage boxes (sold separately) to make effective use of the space inside.

name: Yuzu Cocktail Syrup 12.3 fl oz
description:
Crafted with carefully selected Yuzu Juice, this superb cocktail syrup has an aroma and sour taste that you will love. Yuzu’s pleasant scent, refreshing acidity, and slight bitterness pair perfectly with any spirit to create a surprisingly delicious cocktail and refresher.
*This product is non-alcoholic. It is a fruit syrup used to mix with alcohol beverages.

name: Fragrance Candle - Cedar
description:
Immerse yourself in the soft and luxurious scent of cedar with a blend of earthy, woody scent of nature. Perfect for creating a warm, inviting atmosphere that feels both clean and comforting.  
This elegant candle comes in a dark brown frosted glass jar to create a warm, cozy vibe in any space.

description: Enjoy banpeiyu candy, a sweet, pomelo-flavored hard candy. The taste is refreshing and perfectly balances the subtle tartness and pleasant sweetness of Kumamoto banpeiyu. Individually wrapped so you can share with friends and bring a few with you while on-the-go.

description: A transparent bowl made from soda glass. It's wavy surface texture is reminiscent of hand blown glass.

name: Ginger Candy
description: Savor the warm, spicy kick of ginger in every piece of this simple candy. Refreshing treat made with real ginger juice and sugar that's easy to enjoy anytime.

name: Egg Bolo
description:
Experience the traditional flavor of Japan with Egg Bolo!  These bite-sized biscuits are known for their delightful texture and subtle taste.
Crafted from egg yolks, this delightful treat offers a crunchy and easily dissolvable snack, perfect for satisfying your craving.

name: Mandarin Orange Flavored Candy
description: Large chewy candies infused with mandarin orange juice are filled with a core of kneaded, air-infused candy. They are finished with a dusting of granulated sugar for a sweet, refreshing treat that's great as a quick pick-me-up.

name: Matcha Candy
description: Enjoy a delightful matcha candy that brings together the taste of green tea with a touch of sweetness. A perfect little pick-me-up for any moment.

description: Light, crunchy, and coated in rich caramel—our Caramel Popcorn is the perfect balance of sweet and satisfying. Each bag contains a mix of crunchy and fluffy kernels for a pleasant blend of different textures, enhanced by the gentle sweetness and savory aroma of caramel. A delightful snack for movie nights or anytime cravings hits.

name: Salted Crispy Rice Chips
description:
These chips have a crispy texture, achieved by baking them in the oven before frying. They are made with rice produced in Japan.
Freshly cooked rice is loosened, shaped, sliced one by one, and baked in the oven. After drying for several days, it is deep-fried at the end to give it a crispy texture. Simply seasoned with salt so that you can enjoy the unique sweetness and flavor of the rice.

name: Chocolate Coated Wheat Puffs
description: Delicate wheat puffs crafted with care to capture a light, airy texture and fragrant aroma. We blend two types of wheat puffs and coat them gradually to achieve the perfect balance. Finished with a gentle chocolate coating that brings subtle sweetness without overwhelming the delicate grain flavors.

description:
A timeless collared shirt made from airy and cooling French linen. It features a gentle, worn texture that enhances its fit and comfort with each use. Linen is breathable and dries quickly, making it the perfect option for summer.
French linen is from the Normandy region of France where the climate and soil are ideal for growing high-quality flax plants. This creates stronger linen threads and results in longer lasting clothing.

This cotton puff is composed of a sturdier outer section and soft cotton batting in the center. This type of puff is designed for high absorbency so it is good for intense care. 

How to use:Apply a generous amount of lotion or toner until the pad is translucent. Lay the pad flat over the middle and ring fingers, using the pinky and index fingers to hold it in place. Gently wipe or massage outward on your face.

name: Polypropylene Pen Case - 2 Compartments
description: A translucent pen case made of polypropylene that is easy to clean. Because you can see the contents from the outside, you can be confident all your items are packed and ready to go while still looking neat. Great for storing pens, pencils and other writing utensils, it features a smaller compartment for an eraser, lead or small items like sticky notes.

name: Silicone Multipurpose Band
description: Organize your kitchen and home with these versatile silicone multipurpose bands. Designed as a durable and reusable alternative to single-use ties, these bands are perfect for sealing food bags, bundling charging cables, or securing household tools. Each band features a unique dual-fastening design: use the long center loop like a traditional elastic, or stretch the band to hook the head through the small end loop for a secure, zip-tie style hold. name: Stainless Steel Long Measure Spoon - Small
description: Small and simple measuring spoon. The long handle lets you scoop all the way down the container without waste. Made from stainless steel for more durable built. A 1/2 line is engraved so that a 1/2 volume can be easily measured.

name: TPU Clear Case
description: Made of TPU material for easy cleaning. Clear case lets you see the contents.

name: Recycled Polypropylene Cotton Pad and Swab Case with Lid
description:
A makeup box made from partially recycled polypropylene that is sturdy and easy to clean. The translucent material also allows you to quickly see the contents inside, without adding too much visual clutter. The perfect size for neatly storing cotton pads and swabs, as well as cosmetics or other small items.
Discover more storage option with our Polypropylene Makeup Box series!

name: Vegetable Tanned Leather Slim Mesh Belt
description: Made from leather tanned with vegetable tannins.

name: Cotton Jersey Rugby Shirt
description:
This women's rugby shirt is made with 2-ply organic cotton jersey material, providing the perfect amount of thickness for comfort and durability. The collar and short placket give this shirt a classic, preppy look that suits any outfit.

description:
Shorts made with very stretchy denim to provide a comfortable and flexible fit. Perfect for the spring and summer weather. Made with organic cotton.

A small, fine-toothed grater best for fresh parmesan cheese, lemon zest or other garnishes in small amounts.

name: Yellow Cedar Chopsticks - 5 Pairs
description: Lightweight chopsticks made from yellow cedar wood.

name: Nylon Mesh Vertical/Horizontal Pen Case Thin - Gray
description: A pen case made of light and durable nylon mesh fabric, structured in a way that can open both horizontally or vertically for your convenience.

name: PET Clear Spray Bottle 15ml (0.5 fl Oz)
description: These compact travel-sized bottles are convenient for dividing lotions and other products into small portions. Made from PET material for durability. ⚠ Warning: Cancer - https://www.p65warnings.ca.gov/

name: Labo Olive Leather Holeless Belt
description: A belt made with leather partially tanned using water and other components left over from the olive oil extraction process, reducing product waste and transforming it into a classic and versatile accessory. It has a sleek appearance and is adjustable without holes so sizing is not restricted.

name: Replaceable Head Telescopic Pole
description:
This aluminum pole can be used in combination with any head of the MUJI cleaning supplies system. It is telescopic so that can the length be adjusted to suit your needs.
At MUJI, we believe that daily cleaning is the essence of a simple, pleasant life. Our modular MUJI Cleaning Tools are designed for convenience and efficiency with easily interchangeable attachment heads and poles, making it an essential tool in your home.

name: Cream Container - Small
description: A compact travel sized jar to bring your lotion or skincare with you on your adventures. Comes in various convenient sizes to suit your needs.

name: Screwdriver Set
description:
A small and convenient screwdriver set that comes with 8 interchangeable tips.

name: Stainless Steel Butter Spreader
description:
This stainless steel butter knife has a standard design that suits any type of cuisine. The handle length and curve angle have been carefully designed to make it easy to hold and use. 
Made from rust-resistant 18-8 stainless steel, the surface has been polished in fine, linear strokes to create a matte hairline finish.

name: Stainless Steel Straight Handle Spoon - Large
description:
This stainless steel spoon features a slim, flat handle designed for comfortable and easy use.
Made from rust-resistant 18-8 stainless steel, the surface has been polished in fine, linear strokes to create a matte hairline finish.

name: Stainless Steel Straight Handle Fork - Large
description:
This stainless steel fork features a slim, flat handle designed for comfortable and easy use.
Made from rust-resistant 18-8 stainless steel, the surface has been polished in fine, linear strokes to create a matte hairline finish.

name: Acacia Soup Spoon with Oil Finish
description:
A lightweight spoon that easy to use when eating rice porridge and soup. It doesn't conduct heat easily, so it can be used safely when eating hot food without getting burned.
Crafted from natural acacia wood, renowned for its durability and beautiful grain patterns, this spoon adds a touch of elegance to your kitchen. The surface has a vegetable oil finish that enhances the wood's natural luster and provides a protective layer, ensuring durability and resistance to moisture.

name: Planted Tree Paper Bleed Proof Lined Notebook 6 mm - B5 (5 Pack)
description:
Five high quality notebooks with color coded spines to help you keep track of their function. Each of these B5 notebooks has 36 sheets that are thin but can withstand highlighters and pens without bleeding through. Each notebook is lined with 0.23" spacing.
This item is part of the MUJI Afforestation effort, allowing communities to choose and benefit from the trees they cultivate directly.
Browse our Notebooks Collection and Binders Collection for more options!

name: Non-Stick Rice Paddle
description: Embossed on both sides up to the edge, this rice paddle prevents rice from sticking to it. The underside features a protrusion that props up the paddle to keep it clean, preventing contact with the counter when placed down flat. Featuring an easy-to-grip handle, with an elongated design for easy mixing and a slim width for mess-free serving.

name: Peanuts Chocolate
description: Freshly roasted peanuts enrobed in chocolate and cut into delicious bite-sized clusters.

name: Stainless Steel Sponge Rack
description: A sponge rack made from stainless steel. The suction cup design allows you to easily attach this rack to the side of your sink for convenient storage.

name: Cream Container - Large
description: A compact travel sized jar to bring your lotion or skincare with you on your adventures. Comes in various convenient sizes to suit your needs.

name: Mini Silicone Oven Mitt
description:
A protective mini oven mitt designed to keep your hands safe while handling hot cookware and bakeware in the kitchen. Made of food-grade soft silicone that is comfortable to wear, with anti-slip texture designs for easy gripping. Hanging storage holes save space when not in use.
Includes one oven mitt only.

name: Stainless Steel Strainer - Medium
description: Lightweight and easy to use. Can be stacked with our stainless steel bowls. Rust resistant 18-8 Stainless steel used.

name: Cut Cotton
description:
Our cut cotton is made of 100% cotton, pressed into shape and extremely soft to the touch. It's designed to be less absorbent so that you can get the benefits of using a cotton pad with your skincare without a lot of product being lost. Perfect for daily situations.

name: Stainless Steel Mixing Bowl - Medium
description: The shape of these bowls make it easier to be stacked neatly with each other. Stainless steel used to be rust resistant. There are measurements printed inside the bowl, making it very convenient when baking.

name: Planted Tree Paper Loose Leaf 7mm Lined B5 - 100 sheets
description: Experience a smooth writing surface with this B5 loose-leaf paper, made from trees specifically cultivated for paper production to support sustainable forest management and environmental protection. Its high-quality texture resists ink bleed-through, delivering a clean finish on both sides of the page. name: Compact Notebook A7 - Purple
description:
Small and portable, this A7 notebook is convenient for note taking and doodling wherever you go, fitting easily into your pocket or bag. It has a loop on the side that perfectly fits our Compact Pens, so you can create a coordinated set in your favorite color. Contains 88 sheets of smooth blank paper. Available in a variety of colors.
Pens sold separately. Notepad refills will be available starting Fall 2026.

name: Foldable Eyebrow Makeup Razor (2 Pack)
description: Get the perfect brow shape with the Eyebrow Makeup Razor, foldable and available in a set of 2! Take one on your travels and keep the other for home use. The blade is short for precise shaving that matches your brow's height.
